company.name: Meta-Engine
company.description: Autonomous business deployment engine — S0–S8 state machine, 13 pipeline agents, recursive economic selection.

agents.name: Orchestrator
agents.title: Master Controller
agents.capabilities: Deterministic coordination layer — enforces protocol, contract validity, and state progression across all agents.

agents.name: Strategist
agents.title: Strategy Lead
agents.capabilities: Kicks off pipeline from 'Do it' issues, reviews cycles, makes next-cycle decisions.

agents.name: Researcher
agents.title: Market Researcher
agents.capabilities: Scores 3 market opportunities, picks the best, hands off to Architect.

agents.name: Architect
agents.title: Solution Architect
agents.capabilities: Designs the technical and business architecture for selected opportunities.

agents.name: Builder
agents.title: Product Builder
agents.capabilities: Turns selected opportunities into operational businesses with validation-ready workflows.

agents.name: Developer
agents.title: Software Developer
agents.capabilities: Implements technical solutions and code for the products being built.

agents.name: Validator
agents.title: Quality Validator
agents.capabilities: Runs validation gates before state transitions; blocks progression on failure.

agents.name: Deployer
agents.title: Deployment Specialist
agents.capabilities: Handles deployment of validated products to production environments.

agents.name: Offer Designer
agents.title: Offer Designer
agents.capabilities: Designs compelling offers and pricing structures for deployed products.

agents.name: Outbound Closer
agents.title: Outbound Closer
agents.capabilities: Drives first engagement and closes initial customers.

agents.name: Onboarding Agent
agents.title: Customer Onboarding
agents.capabilities: Completes customer onboarding; produces completion artifact required for S4→S5 transition.

agents.name: Telemetry Analyst
agents.title: Telemetry Analyst
agents.capabilities: Ingests telemetry, tracks KPIs, produces weekly portfolio delta reports.

agents.name: Mechanism Engineer
agents.title: Mechanism Engineer
agents.capabilities: Proposes and tests mechanism patches; promotes improvements through the patch cycle.
